heading: Congressional and public notification of candidate countries, eligibility criteria, and eligible countries
label: 7707 Congressional and public notification of candidate countries, eligibility criteria, and eligible countries

children.text: shall prepare and submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report that contains a list of all candidate countries identified under , and all countries that would be candidate countries if the countries met the requirement contained in , for the fiscal year; andsection 7705 of this titlesection 7705(a)(2) of this title
shall publish in the Federal Register the information contained in the report described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: Identification of eligibility criteria and methodology
children.label: b Identification of eligibility criteria and methodology

children.text: shall prepare and submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report that contains a list of the criteria and methodology described in subsections (a) and (b) of that will be used to determine eligibility for each candidate country identified under subsection (a);section 7706 of this title
shall publish in the Federal Register the information contained in the report described in paragraph (1); and
may conduct one or more public hearings on the eligibility criteria and methodology.

children.heading: Public comment and congressional consultation
children.label: c Public comment and congressional consultation

children.heading: Public comment
children.label: 1 Public comment
children.text: The Chief Executive Officer shall, for the 30-day period beginning on the date of publication in the Federal Register of the information contained in the report described in subsection (b)(1), accept public comment and consider such comment for purposes of determining eligible countries under .section 7706 of this title

children.heading: Congressional consultation
children.label: 2 Congressional consultation
children.text: The Chief Executive Officer shall consult with the appropriate congressional committees on the extent to which the candidate countries meet the criteria described in .section 7706(b) of this title

shall prepare and submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report that contains a list of all such eligible countries, an identification of those countries on such list with respect to which the Board will seek to enter into a Compact under , and a justification for such eligibility determination and selection for Compact negotiation; andsection 7708 of this title
shall publish in the Federal Register the information contained in the report described in paragraph (1).
